backend/main.mo: Motoko canister handling user profiles and admin‑protected product CRUD operations with blob image storage and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping high‑level requirements to related frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend files across components, hooks, layout, and product features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH color variables, dark mode tokens, and global background/foreground rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry file loading fonts, metadata, and mounting the React app root.
frontend/README.md: Frontend documentation explaining the jewellery store features, stack, setup steps, and admin initialization workflow.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up the TanStack Router routes, global layout, theme provider, and toast system for the application.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductEdi: Admin dialog for creating and editing products with validation, image upload handling, and mutations to the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductIma: Handles image selection, validation, preview, and creation of ExternalBlob with upload progress for product images.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductsTa: Displays a table of products with image, name, price, and edit/delete actions including a delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/auth/AdminRouteG: Protects admin routes by checking authentication and admin status, showing login or access-denied screens if needed.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity with loading states and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Dialog for first-time profile setup allowing users to submit their name via a save-profile mutation.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartLineIte: Renders a cart item row with product details, quantity controls, total price, and remove option.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorStat: Shows an error message with optional retry button in a centered layout.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSk: Provides skeleton loaders for product cards, grids, and product detail pages.
frontend/src/components/common/MotionFad: Applies a delayed fade-in animation to wrapped content.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with header, routed content area, and footer.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with branding, navigation links, contact info, social icons, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeaderNav: Navigation header with logo, links, login button, cart indicator, and responsive mobile menu with admin link when applicable.
frontend/src/components/products/Feature: Fetches products and displays the first four as featured, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/products/ImageZo: Provides a zoomable product image using a dialog that opens a larger view on click.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Displays a product thumbnail, name, price, and add‑to‑cart button with link to product detail.
Shows a product image with a shimmer placeholder until loaded.
frontend/src/components/products/Related: Shows up to four related products excluding the current one, with a loading skeleton.
frontend/src/components/seo/Seo.tsx: Sets the document title and description meta tag based on provided props.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Zustand store for cart items with add, remove, update, totals, and persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity auth state, login flow, stored identities, and provides identity context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles and products, using the actor for backend calls.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base layers, custom color variables, typography, utility classes, and animations for global styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard for managing products, including listing, creating, editing, and deleting items with profile checks.
frontend/src/pages/cart/CartPage.tsx: Displays cart contents, supports updating and removing items, and provides an order summary with checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/checkout/CheckoutPage: Handles checkout form validation and submission, processes a mock order, and clears the cart on completion.
frontend/src/pages/home/HomePage.tsx: Homepage with hero section, featured products, categories, and testimonials.
frontend/src/pages/product/ProductDetail: Loads and displays product details with add-to-cart support, error handling, and related products.
frontend/src/pages/shop/ShopPage.tsx: Renders the shop page with category filters, sorting, product fetching, and grid display including loading and error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading, storing, and clearing URL and sessionStorage parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, custom colors, typography, animations, and plugins for the frontend UI.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, features, requirements, and architectural notes for the jewellery e‑commerce app.
